description_long: This is a small, cylindrical cup with a rounded handle attached to one side. The cup's surface is predominantly white with a speckled gray pattern, giving it a textured, decorative appearance. On one side, there is a large black oval shape with the word 'milk' written in lowercase white letters, making it visually distinctive and playful. The handle is thick and appears sturdy, matching the speckled pattern of the main body. The cup's rim is slightly darkened, suggesting a subtle outline or wear. The interior is also speckled, and the overall finish appears matte with a slight translucency, hinting at a ceramic or frosted glass material.
description: A small, speckled white cup with a thick handle and a black oval featuring the word 'milk' on one side. The surface is matte and slightly translucent, with a playful decorative pattern.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black oval with 'milk' text and the handle on the right.
description_view_1: Rear view with the handle centered and no visible text or major decoration.
description_view_2: Side view with the handle on the left and only the speckled pattern visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side of the cup, showing the speckled pattern and a partial view of the black oval.
